name: Congealed Beet Relish Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in 1/4 cup cold reserved beet juice.
2. In a bowl, mix together the vinegar, horseradish, onion, celery, and green bell pepper with the sugar, salt, and 1/2 cup of the reserved beet juice.
3. Add the dissolved gelatin to the mixture.
4. Chop the beets and add them to the gelatin mixture.
5. Pour the mixture into a 3-cup mold or individual molds.
6. Chill until firm.
Serves: 6
Source: "Mountain Measures" of the Junior League of Charleston, WV.
